name: Execution of Renamed PaExec
description: Detects the execution of PaExec, even when renamed, by using a combination of product name and Imphash.

prompts.prompt: Renamed PaExec detected executing, indicating potential defense evasion or unauthorized remote execution. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **Image Path** {Image}, **Parent Image Path** {ParentImage}, **Command Line** {CommandLine}, **User** {User}, **Product** {Product}, **Imphash** {Imphash}, **Computer** {Computer}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately for signs of malicious remote administration or lateral movement.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path of the executed file.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path of the parent process.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the process.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: Product
parameters.description: The product name associated with the executable, often 'PAExec'.

parameters.name: Imphash
parameters.description: The Imphash of the executable, a unique identifier.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The computer on which the event occurred.
